author: cvuosalo
body: To run Run 3 DD4hep workflows that read geometry from the DB, changes need to be made in Geometry configuration files. This draft PR has a one possible solution. Please review and comment. Please check that all the necessary  configs are included for the case of DD4hep reading geometry from the DB.
title: [RFC] [DD4hep] Enable Run 3 DD4hep workflows that read geometry from DB
